## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Kevin Mo's background and potential fit for a business operations role at Rotex.](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kevin has experience in early-stage startups, data analysis, and consulting, seeking to return to a startup environment](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Rotex is planning headcount expansion post-fundraising, with immediate needs in recruiting and client operations](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [A flexible business operations generalist role could be a good fit, potentially starting with client operations and expanding to other areas](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Next steps involve Kevin speaking with other team members and potentially completing a take-home case study](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)

## Topics

### Kevin's Background and Experience

  - [Helped early-stage startup grow from 0 to $10M ARR in 3 years](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Built scalable systems and infrastructure from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Led successful SaaS implementation projects at IBM](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Grew GenAI team at IBM from 2 to 50 people](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Strong skills in data analysis, problem-solving, and client operations](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

### Project Example: Reducing Churn

  - [Identified high churn as a key issue through data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Conducted quantitative and qualitative research to understand root causes](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Implemented changes to onboarding process and marketing channels](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Result: 20% reduction in churn, saving millions in ARR](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Demonstrated skills in SQL, data infrastructure setup, and BI tool implementation](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Rotex's Current Needs

  - [Immediate focus on hiring recruiters for engineering and account management roles](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Planning to build out operations org, including finance, RevOps, and client operations](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Need for systems and process improvements across customer-facing and internal operations](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)

### Potential Role at Rotex

  - [Discussed possibility of a flexible business operations role](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [Initial focus could be on client operations, building systems and processes](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Opportunity to expand into RevOps and other areas as needed](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
  - [Aligns with Kevin's goal of learning diverse skills for future founder role](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)

### Interview Process and Timeline

  - [Potential next steps: speaking with Kyle (client group lead) or Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)
  - [Take-home case study assignment likely part of the process](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)
  - [Aiming to hire for a March start date if possible](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
  - [Moving quickly due to upcoming fundraising close](https://fathom.video/share/zJLG7VDQfgxB6Dx8spb6FcTvZzWh3Fd_?tab=summary&timestamp=2157.0)
